ddls:
CREATE TABLE "educational_attainment" (
  "attainment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational attainment record */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location (e.g., state, city) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Male, Female, Non-binary) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity (e.g., White, Black, Asian) */,
  "value" REAL /* Percentage value of the subgroup */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period for the statistic */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the record was entered into the system */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score on a scale (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attainment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_attainment_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES demographic_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_attainment_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_attainment_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the demographic group */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the time period */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month (e.g., January, February) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., Survey, Census) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., Online, In-person) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Published, Archived) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search purposes */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the author (e.g., Dr., Mr., Ms.) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the author (e.g., Senior Researcher, Analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* User's affiliation (e.g., University, Government) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report version */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the version was published */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in the version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the version */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
